mapper.select: SELECT * FROM food_categories ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id where food_categories.status=1

SELECT food_categories.id, food_categories.created_at, food_categories.name as food_name, food_categories.details, food_categories.image, categories.name as category_name FROM food_categories join categories on food_categories.category_id=categories.id where food_categories.status=1 and food_categories.id=#{id}
